note: Random held-out TEST possessions for the nba-rl-sim 'stream' mode. Same per-frame raw entity schema as possessions.json (entity (x,y,vx,vy) in the env's basket-relative half-court frame + scalar context), so the app can recompute the 73 features and replay each possession. EXCLUDES the curated possessions in possessions.json. Q-values are the Dueling model's, in network order [shoot, pass_1..4].
